header.title: Add Watermark to Images — Text & Logo Watermark Online
header.description: Free online watermark tool to add text or logo watermarks to your images. Customize position, opacity, rotation, size, and font. Protect your photos and artwork from unauthorized use — 100% client-side, your files never leave your browser.
header.keywords: add watermark, watermark image, photo watermark, text watermark, logo watermark, protect images, watermark photos online, image copyright tool

dropzone.clickOrDrag: Click or drag & drop your image
dropzone.privacyNote: Your image never leaves your device.
dropzone.formatsSupported: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP
dropzone.processedLocally: Processed locally · JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF

options.label: Click or drag & drop your image
options.privacyNote: Your image never leaves your device.

howToUse.title: How to Use Add Watermark
howToUse.step1Desc: Click the upload area or drag and drop an image from your computer.
howToUse.step2Desc: Type the text you want to overlay or upload a logo image to use as a watermark.
howToUse.step3Desc: Choose where to place the watermark and adjust font size, color, opacity, and rotation.
howToUse.step4Desc: Click Apply Watermark, then download your watermarked image in your preferred format.

items.question: Can I use an image as a watermark?
items.answer: Yes. Switch to the Image type in the options panel and upload a logo or graphic to use as your watermark.

items.question: Is the watermark applied permanently?
items.answer: Yes, once you apply and download the image, the watermark is permanently rendered onto the image.

items.question: Can I adjust the opacity of the watermark?
items.answer: Absolutely. Use the opacity slider to make your watermark fully opaque or semi-transparent.

items.question: What image formats are supported?
items.answer: We support JPG, PNG, GIF, and WebP for both input and output.

items.question: Is my image safe and private?
items.answer: Yes. All processing happens entirely in your browser — your images are never uploaded to any server.

items.question: Can I tile the watermark across the image?
items.answer: Yes. Enable the Tile option to repeat the watermark across the entire image.

examples.title: Try an Example
examples.result: A semi-transparent copyright notice appears at the bottom-right corner of your image.
